Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"Run #{r['run_number']}: {r['name']} | {r['status']} | {r['conclusion']} | {r['head_sha'][:8]}\\"\) for r in data.get\('workflow_runs',[]\)]")
